question: What is the primary color of the dried flowers arranged on the white plate? A. Bright Yellow B. Dark Purple C. Dark Green D. Orange-Brown
What entities are present on the white plate and how are they arranged?
canonical_answer: A white round ceramic plate holds dried dark purple hibiscus flowers, a yellow lemon wedge, and dark green tea leaves. A fresh orange turmeric root lies near the lemon wedge on the plate. The plate rests on a brown woven placemat with a geometric pattern. A hand touches the dried flowers. Wrapped gift boxes sit in the background.

question: How many glass containers filled with red liquid are visible?
In the initial scenes of the video, where is the long thin orange turmeric root positioned on the white plate? A. On the right side B. On the left side C. In the center D. At the top portion

When the bundle of fresh turmeric roots tied with a red band is visible, where is the small pile of dark green dried tea leaves located? A. In the center B. On the left side C. On the right side D. At the bottom
Describe the visible interactions with the ingredients on the plate as the video progresses.
canonical_answer: At 0s, dried hibiscus and turmeric sit on a white plate; at 8s, a hand touches the pile of purple flowers; at 10s, a turmeric bundle tied with red string appears; at 14s, a hand holds a single flower above the plate; at 18s, holiday gift boxes appear in the background.
